[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A blurry, low-resolution scene shows two people in the background near several large, dark circular shapes on a green grassy area, with the word “ASELI” prominently displayed in the foreground.

Main Subject:
The central focus is the large foreground text “ASELI,” shown in white letters with a black outline, overlaying a scene where two people stand or move on a path through grass, and large black circular objects are positioned in front.

Setting:
The background appears to be outdoors on a grassy area with a path or walkway. The lighting looks bright and daylight-like, but the exact time of day and weather are unclear. In the far background there are dark green foliage or bushes and a vertical pale surface on the right.

Visual Details:
The image has a grainy, pixelated look. One person in the center background wears a light-colored top and dark pants, standing with their upper body turned slightly away and their arms down and/or bent. Another person is partially visible near the lower left area. Several large, dark circular rings or tires are arranged across the foreground and mid-ground on the gray path, with another ring-like shape visible near the right side. The overall composition is dominated by the foreground text overlay.

Visible Text:
ASELI

Practical Summary:
The image is an outdoor, blurry scene with two people near grass and multiple large circular ring-like objects. The word “ASELI” is overlaid prominently in the lower portion of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
